extortion.description: [AI generated] Unimore.it refers to the University of Modena and Reggio Emilia, located in Italy. Founded in 1175, it's one of the oldest and most prestigious universities globally, offering a wide range of study programs in various fields. Unimore is renowned for its high standards of research and teaching. Its faculties include economics, humanities, law, sciences, medicine, pharmacology, and social sciences among others.
